req.title: Announcement rollout — variant 4
req.statement: A system-admin shall publish an org-wide announcement to employees in chosen departments; publishing without any department selection shall be rejected. Additionally, the operation must be rate-limited per user.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers four testable concerns: (1) successful announcement publication to selected departments (positive / EP), (2) rejection when no departments are selected (negative / NEG), (3) boundary on department selection — exactly one department selected (boundary / BVA), and (4) rate-limit enforcement after repeated rapid submissions (negative / STC). Tests are designed to be self-contained via admin_session and announcement_payload fixtures, use deterministic UUIDs for idempotency, and target /org-announcements/new.

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_multiple_departments_succeeds
preconditions: At least two departments exist in the org
No duplicate announcement with same idempotency key exists
actions: POST /org-announcements/new with valid title, body, and two department IDs
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Target employees in both departments receive notification
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest

def test_publish_announcement_with_multiple_departments_succeeds(admin_session, dept_ids):
    idempotency_key = str(uuid.uuid4())
    payload = {
        "title": f"Announcement {idempotency_key}",
        "body": "All-hands meeting scheduled.",
        "department_ids": dept_ids[:2],
        "idempotency_key": idempotency_key,
    }
    resp = admin_session.post("/org-announcements/new", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert "id" in data, "Response missing announcement ID"
    assert data["department_ids"] == dept_ids[:2]
    notifications = <get_notifications_for_departments>(dept_ids[:2])
    assert len(notifications) > 0, "No notifications delivered to target employees"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_without_departments_returns_422
actions: POST /org-announcements/new with valid title and body but empty department_ids list
Capture HTTP response status and error body
expected: Response body contains field-level validation error referencing department_ids
trace: R-WEB-090: error pathway — 422 when no departments selected
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest

def test_publish_announcement_without_departments_returns_422(admin_session):
    payload = {
        "title": f"Announcement {uuid.uuid4()}",
        "body": "This should be rejected.",
        "department_ids": [],
    }
    resp = admin_session.post("/org-announcements/new", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    error_body = resp.json()
    error_fields = <extract_error_fields>(error_body)
    assert "department_ids" in error_fields, "Error must reference department_ids field"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_exactly_one_department_succeeds
preconditions: At least one department exists in the org
actions: POST /org-announcements/new with valid title, body, and exactly one department ID
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Announcement is persisted with exactly one department association
Employees in that single department receive notification
trace: R-WEB-090: boundary — minimum valid department count is 1
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest

def test_publish_announcement_with_exactly_one_department_succeeds(admin_session, dept_ids):
    idempotency_key = str(uuid.uuid4())
    single_dept = [dept_ids[0]]
    payload = {
        "title": f"Announcement {idempotency_key}",
        "body": "Boundary: one department only.",
        "department_ids": single_dept,
        "idempotency_key": idempotency_key,
    }
    resp = admin_session.post("/org-announcements/new", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data["department_ids"] == single_dept, "Expected exactly one department association"
    notifications = <get_notifications_for_departments>(single_dept)
    assert len(notifications) > 0, "No notifications delivered for single-department announcement"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_rate_limit_enforced_per_user
preconditions: Rate-limit threshold N is known (imported from config)
Admin has made fewer than N announcement requests in current window
actions: POST /org-announcements/new N+1 times in rapid succession with unique idempotency keys
Record status code of each response
expected: The (N+1)th request returns HTTP 429 Too Many Requests
trace: R-WEB-090: operation must be rate-limited per user
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest
from config import ANNOUNCEMENT_RATE_LIMIT_THRESHOLD

def test_publish_announcement_rate_limit_enforced_per_user(rate_limit_admin_session, dept_ids):
    <reset_rate_limit_for_user>(rate_limit_admin_session)
    responses = []
    for _ in range(ANNOUNCEMENT_RATE_LIMIT_THRESHOLD + 1):
        payload = {
            "title": f"RL-Test {uuid.uuid4()}",
            "body": "Rate limit probe.",
            "department_ids": [dept_ids[0]],
            "idempotency_key": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        }
        responses.append(rate_limit_admin_session.post("/org-announcements/new", json=payload))
    accepted = [r for r in responses if r.status_code == 201]
    throttled = [r for r in responses if r.status_code == 429]
    assert len(accepted) == ANNOUNCEMENT_RATE_LIMIT_THRESHOLD
    assert len(throttled) >= 1, "Expected at least one 429 after threshold exceeded"
    assert "Retry-After" in throttled[0].headers, "429 must include Retry-After header"
